raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 2770 will help prevent future sexual harassment in the workplace.",
    "The bill will enable businesses to avoid hiring repeat sexual harassment offenders.",
    "AB 2770 aims to ensure that workplace protection can prevent serial harassers from abusing victims at future places of work.",
    "AB 2770 allows former employers to speak openly to prospective employers about a sexual harassment investigation that resulted in the termination of an employee.",
    "Credible claims of sexual harassment by victims to their employers are protected under AB 2770.",
    "AB 2770 makes it less likely that an accused harasser will file defamation suits against the victim."
```
